profile.name: Mohamed
profile.bio: Building digital experiences that matter. I'm Mohamed, a self-taught Front-end Engineer from Morocco. I specialize in crafting high-performance, pixel-perfect interfaces for the modern web.

projects.title: Nexus SaaS
projects.description: A premium enterprise dashboard with real-time analytics and user management.

projects.title: LuxeCommerce
projects.description: Luxury e-commerce experience with focus on smooth transitions and performance.

projects.title: Cognitive AI
projects.description: AI-powered tool for developers to generate and optimize code snippets.

points: Optimizing Core Web Vitals for global startups.
Building design systems from scratch using Tailwind CSS.
Integrating modern payment systems like Stripe & Binance.
Modernized legacy jQuery applications to React.
Improved site load speeds by 40% through lazy loading.
Collaborated on building complex API integrations.

testimonial.text: Mohamed has a rare eye for detail. He doesn't just build websites; he builds experiences that feel premium.
testimonial.author: Sarah Jenkins
